    A

    AboutDialog - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.Dialogs
    This class represents the "About" dialog of the Pure Stream Downloader application.
    AboutDialog(Frame, boolean) - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.Dialogs.AboutDialog
    Constructor for the AboutDialog.
    addMediaFile(MediaFile) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
    Adds a new MediaFile to the model.
    addMediaFile(MediaFile) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Adds a downloaded media file to the local library view.
    ALL - Enum constant in enum class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.FilterType
    Shows all media files regardless of their type.
    apply() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.LibraryPanelLayout
    Clears the panel and rebuilds its layout.
    apply() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.MainPanelLayout
    Clears the panel and rebuilds its layout.
    apply() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.PreferencesPanelLayout
    Clears the panel and rebuilds its layout.
    applyFrameIcon(JFrame, String, int) - Static method in class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.IconUtils
    Applies the given icon resource as the window icon of a JFrame.
    AUDIO - Enum constant in enum class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.FilterType
    Shows only audio files.

    B

    buildCommand(String, PreferencesPanel, String, String) - Static method in class mosqueira.pureStream.ControladorInterno.CommandBuilder
    Builds the command arguments for yt-dlp according to the current UI selections.

    C

    cargarPanelPrincipal() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Initializes the main panels and shared model after a successful login.
    cargarPreferencias() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Loads saved settings from MainFrame into UI controls.
    clearAll() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
    Removes all media files from the model.
    CommandBuilder - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.ControladorInterno
    Builds the yt-dlp command based on the selected download options and user preferences.
    COMPONENT - Static variable in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Media polling component used to synchronize with the remote library.

    D

    doInBackground() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.ControladorInterno.DownloadTask
    Runs yt-dlp on a background thread, publishing output lines to DownloadTask.process(java.util.List).
    done() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.ControladorInterno.DownloadTask
    Called on the EDT when the background work finishes.
    DownloadTask - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.ControladorInterno
    SwingWorker that executes yt-dlp in the background and streams its output to a log area.
    DownloadTask(String, PreferencesPanel, JTextArea, JComboBox<String>, JComboBox<String>, MainPanel) - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.ControladorInterno.DownloadTask
    Creates a background download task executed with SwingWorker.

    E

    email() - Method in record class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LoginPanel.RememberData
    Returns the value of the email record component.
    equals(Object) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Checks equality based on the absolute file path.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LoginPanel.RememberData
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

    F

    FilterType - Enum Class in mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo
    Represents the available filter types used in the library panel.

    G

    getBtnBack() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the button that navigates back to the main screen.
    getBtnBrowseFolder() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the button that opens the folder chooser dialog.
    getBtnDelete() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the button that deletes the selected local file from disk and the library.
    getBtnDownload() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the button that starts the download process.
    getBtnDownloadFromCloud() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the button that downloads the selected cloud file to local disk.
    getBtnOpenLibrary() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the button that opens the library panel.
    getBtnPlay() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the button that plays the last downloaded file.
    getBtnSaveAndReturn() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the button that saves the preferences and navigates back.
    getBtnSearch() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the button that executes the current search and filter.
    getBtnSearchPath() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the button used to search and select the executable path.
    getBtnUploadToCloud() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the button that uploads the selected local file to the cloud.
    getChkLimit() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the checkbox that enables download speed limitation.
    getChkM3U() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the checkbox that enables automatic M3U playlist creation.
    getColumnCount() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
    Returns the number of columns in the table.
    getColumnName(int) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
    Returns the column name displayed in the table header.
    getComboFilter() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the combo box used to select the filter type.
    getComboFormat() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the combo box used to select the output format (e.g. mp4 or mp3).
    getComboQuality() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the combo box used to select the output quality (resolution/bitrate).
    getDateDownloaded() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Returns the raw Date when the file was downloaded (or added).
    getExecutablePath() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Returns the currently configured yt-dlp executable path.
    getExecutablePath() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the configured path to the yt-dlp executable.
    getFile() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Returns the file as a File instance using the stored absolute path.
    getFileName() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Returns the media file name (e.g.
    getFileSizeBytes() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Returns the file size in bytes.
    getFormattedDate() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Returns the download date formatted for display in the UI.
    getJwtToken() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Returns the JWT token for the current session.
    getLblAds() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the label that describes the advertisement-related settings.
    getLblFolder() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the label associated with the download folder field.
    getLblFormat() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the label associated with the output format selector.
    getLblQuality() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the label associated with the quality selector.
    getLblSelectPath() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the label that indicates the executable path selection.
    getLblUrl() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the label associated with the URL input field.
    getLblValue() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the label that displays the current speed limit value.
    getLibraryPanel() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Returns the library panel instance.
    getLimiteVelocidad() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Returns the current download speed limit in KB/s.
    getLimiteVelocidad() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the configured download speed limit in kilobytes per second.
    getListCellRendererComponent(JList<? extends MediaFile>, MediaFile, int, boolean, boolean) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.MediaFileListRenderer
    Configures and returns the renderer component for a given list item.
    getListDownloads() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the JList that shows the downloaded media files in compact view.
    getMainFrame() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the main application frame that owns this panel.
    getMainFrame() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the main application frame that owns this preferences panel.
    getMediaFileAt(int) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
    Returns the MediaFile stored at the specified row.
    getMediaFiles() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
    Returns the internal list of media files.
    getMimeType() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Returns the detected MIME type of the file.
    getNetworkState() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Returns the network state of this media file.
    getPreferencesPanel() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Returns the preferences panel instance.
    getRemoteId() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Returns the remote identifier, if the media file exists in the remote library.
    getRowCount() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
    Returns the number of rows currently stored in the model.
    getRutaDescargas() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Returns the current download directory path.
    getScrollList() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the scroll pane that contains the downloads list (JList).
    getScrollLog() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the scroll pane that contains the download log output (and progress bar header).
    getScrollTable() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the scroll pane that contains the details table.
    getSeparator() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the separator component used to visually divide sections.
    getSeparatorList() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the separator/border component that titles the downloads list section.
    getSizeInMB() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Returns the file size expressed in megabytes (MB).
    getSliderLimit() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the slider used to define the maximum download speed.
    getTable() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the table that shows the detailed list of media files.
    getTabs() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the tab control used to switch the library source.
    getTxtExecutable() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Returns the text field containing the configured yt-dlp executable path.
    getTxtFolder() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the text field that contains the selected download folder path.
    getTxtSearch() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Returns the search text field used to filter the library.
    getTxtUrl() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Returns the text field where the user enters the media URL to download.
    getUploadedBy() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Returns the uploader identifier associated with this media file, if any.
    getValueAt(int, int) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
    Returns the value stored at a specific cell.

    H

    hashCode() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Generates a hash code using the file path, consistent with MediaFile.equals(Object).
    hashCode() - Method in record class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LoginPanel.RememberData
    Returns a hash code value for this object.

    I

    IconUtils - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp
    Utility class for loading and scaling icons from the classpath resources.
    indexOf(MediaFile) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
    Returns the index of the specified media file.
    isCrearM3U() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Indicates whether the application creates M3U playlists after downloads.
    isCrearM3U() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Indicates whether M3U playlist creation is enabled.
    isLimitarVelocidad() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Indicates whether download speed limiting is enabled.
    isLimitarVelocidad() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Indicates whether download speed limiting is enabled.

    L

    LibraryPanel - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles
    LibraryPanel displays downloaded media files and allows the user to: search, filter, delete local files, and synchronize with cloud media.
    LibraryPanel(MainFrame, MediaTableModel) - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Builds the library panel and initializes UI models, listeners, and stored data.
    LibraryPanelLayout - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp
    Applies a responsive layout to LibraryPanel using MigLayout and a split pane.
    LibraryPanelLayout(LibraryPanel) - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.LibraryPanelLayout
    Creates a layout helper bound to the given panel.
    load(String, int) - Static method in class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.IconUtils
    Loads an image resource from the classpath and scales it to the given size.
    loadNetworkMedia() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Loads media metadata from the cloud service and refreshes the Network/Both lists.
    LoginPanel - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles
    Login screen panel for PureStream.
    LoginPanel(MainFrame) - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LoginPanel
    Creates the login panel and initializes the UI components and listeners.
    LoginPanel.RememberData - Record Class in mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles
    DTO used to persist "remember me" session data locally.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Main entry point.
    MainFrame - Class in mosqueira.pureStream
    Main application window for PureStream.
    MainFrame() - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Creates the main application frame and initializes UI components.
    MainPanel - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles
    Main panel that handles URL input, download actions, and interaction with Preferences and Library panels.
    MainPanel(PreferencesPanel, MainFrame, MediaTableModel) - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Constructs the main download panel.
    MainPanelLayout - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp
    Applies the layout for MainPanel using MigLayout.
    MainPanelLayout(MainPanel) - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.MainPanelLayout
    Creates a layout helper bound to the given main panel.
    MediaFile - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo
    Represents a downloaded media file and its metadata.
    MediaFile(File, Date) - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Creates a new MediaFile from a local File and a download date.
    MediaFileListRenderer - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp
    Custom ListCellRenderer for MediaFile objects.
    MediaFileListRenderer() - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.MediaFileListRenderer
    Creates the renderer panel and configures its subcomponents.
    MediaTableModel - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo
    Table model that manages a collection of MediaFile objects.
    MediaTableModel() - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
    Creates an empty table model.

    N

    notifyDownloaded(MediaFile) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Notifies the panel that a media file has been downloaded and updates the UI.
    notifyDownloadedMedia(MediaFile) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Notifies the application that a new media file has been downloaded.

    P

    paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.PanelUtils
    Paints the gradient background.
    PanelUtils - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp
    Custom background panel that paints a vertical gradient.
    PanelUtils() - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.PanelUtils
    Creates a PanelUtils panel with the default gradient colors.
    PanelUtils(Color, Color) - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.PanelUtils
    Creates a PanelUtils panel with custom gradient colors.
    password() - Method in record class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LoginPanel.RememberData
    Returns the value of the password record component.
    PlaylistValidator - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.ControladorInterno
    Utility class to validate M3U playlists and extract valid HTTP/HTTPS URLs.
    PreferencesPanel - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles
    PreferencesPanel allows the user to configure additional settings for the application, such as creating an M3U file, limiting download speed, and selecting the download path.
    PreferencesPanel(MainFrame) - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel
    Constructs the PreferencesPanel and initializes its components.
    PreferencesPanelLayout - Class in mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp
    Applies a responsive layout to PreferencesPanel using MigLayout.
    PreferencesPanelLayout(PreferencesPanel) - Constructor for class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.PreferencesPanelLayout
    Creates a layout helper bound to the given preferences panel.
    process(List<String>) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.ControladorInterno.DownloadTask
    Receives lines published from the background thread and updates the UI log and progress.

    R

    receiveFiles(List<MediaFile>) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel
    Receives a list of media files (usually from cloud) and updates the UI.
    RememberData(String, String, String) - Constructor for record class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LoginPanel.RememberData
    Creates an instance of a RememberData record class.
    removeMediaFile(int) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
    Removes the media file at the specified row index.
    resetProgress() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Resets the progress bar to 0%.

    S

    setCrearM3U(boolean) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Enables or disables automatic M3U playlist creation.
    setExecutablePath(String) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Sets the path to the yt-dlp executable used to perform downloads.
    setFilePath(String) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Updates the absolute path of the file.
    setJwtToken(String) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Stores the JWT token for the current session.
    setLimitarVelocidad(boolean) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Enables or disables download speed limitation.
    setLimiteVelocidad(int) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Sets the maximum allowed download speed in KB/s.
    setLoggedUser(Usuari) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Sets the current logged user information.
    setMediaFiles(List<MediaFile>) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
    Replaces the current list of media files with a new one.
    setNetworkState(String) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Updates the network state of this media file.
    setProgressValue(int) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel
    Updates the progress bar value and displayed percentage.
    setRemoteId(Integer) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Sets the remote identifier of this file.
    setRutaDescargas(String) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Sets the directory where downloaded files will be saved.
    showLibraryPanel() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Displays the library panel containing downloaded and/or cloud media.
    showMain() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Displays the main download panel.
    showPanel(JPanel) - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Replaces the content of the root container with the given panel.
    showPreferences() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame
    Displays the preferences panel.

    T

    token() - Method in record class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LoginPanel.RememberData
    Returns the value of the token record component.
    toString() - Method in enum class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.FilterType
    Returns the display label associated with this filter type.
    toString() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
    Returns a user-friendly representation for list renderers.
    toString() - Method in record class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LoginPanel.RememberData
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    tryAutoLogin() - Method in class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LoginPanel
    Attempts to authenticate automatically using persisted "remember me" data.

    V

    validateM3U(String) - Static method in class mosqueira.pureStream.ControladorInterno.PlaylistValidator
    Reads an M3U file and returns a list of valid HTTP/HTTPS URLs.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.FilterType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.FilterType
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    VIDEO - Enum constant in enum class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.FilterType
    Shows only video files.
